name: scrape_website
description: Scrape a business website using Apify's Website Content Crawler. Returns cleaned text content from up to 3 pages (homepage, about, products).

url.description: The website URL to scrape (e.g. https://cocacola.com)

max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl (default: 3)

name: generate_ads
description: Analyze scraped website content to extract brand profile, then generate 5 Meta-ready ad variants with targeting and scheduling.

website_content.description: The scraped text content from the website

url.description: The original website URL (used for context)

name: website_to_ads
description: End-to-end: scrape a website URL and generate 5 brand-matched Meta ad variants in one step.

url.description: The business website URL to scrape and generate ads for

civic_token.description: Optional Civic identity token for authenticated export workflows
